As an AI language model, I am unable to click on links or evaluate the relevance of specific web pages. However, I can provide a general definition of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD). OCD is a mental health condition characterized by recurrent, intrusive thoughts (obsessions) and repetitive behaviors or mental acts (compulsions) aimed at reducing anxiety or preventing a feared event. Some common obsessions include fears of contamination, doubts about safety, or intrusive thoughts, while compulsions often involve repetitive cleaning, checking, or counting behaviors. For further clarification and in-depth understanding, it is recommended to click the provided link to the web article or perform a Google search on the topic.
